seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: The email must include specific inquiries about the dates of the exhibitions.
new_constraint: The email must not inquire about the exhibition opening dates.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. The email must include specific inquiries about the dates of the exhibitions. The email must not inquire about the exhibition opening dates.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Upcoming Exhibition Schedule

Dear [Gallery Name] Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am a frequent visitor to your gallery and have long admired the quality of your curated collections. I am writing to inquire about your upcoming exhibition schedule for the next few months.

Could you please provide the specific **end dates** for any shows currently running or planned for the near future? Additionally, if there are new exhibitions scheduled to begin, I would appreciate knowing the **closing dates** for those events as well.

Please note that I am not inquiring about the opening dates or the specific times of the opening receptions, as I will be checking those details separately once the schedule is confirmed.

Thank you for your time and assistance. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Email Address]
